allow: Bash(node -e "require\(''''@electron/get''''\).downloadArtifact\({ version: ''''33.4.0'''', artifactName: ''''electron'''' }\).then\(p => console.log\(''''Downloaded to:'''', p\)\).catch\(e => console.error\(''''Error:'''', e.message\)\)")
Read(//e/JoyDesc/Joydescription mv node_modules/electron node_modules/_electron_bak ELECTRON_RUN_AS_NODE=0 node_modules/.bin/electron . 2 1 head -5 mv node_modules/_electron_bak node_modules/**)

Bash(powershell -Command "Select-String -Path ''E:\\JoyDesc\\Joydescription\\node_modules\\electron-builder\\*'' -Pattern ''winCodeSign'' -Recurse | Select-Object Filename, LineNumber, Line | Where-Object { $_.Line -match ''path|dir|cache|version'' } | Select-Object -First 20")

Bash(powershell -Command "Get-ChildItem -Path ''E:\\JoyDesc\\Joydescription\\node_modules\\app-builder-lib\\'' -Filter ''*.js'' -Recurse | Select-String -Pattern ''winCodeSign'' | Select-Object Filename, LineNumber, Line | Select-Object -First 20")

Bash(powershell -Command "Get-ChildItem -Path ''E:\\JoyDesc\\Joydescription\\node_modules\\app-builder-lib\\'' -Filter ''*.js'' -Recurse | ForEach-Object { Select-String -Path $_.FullName -Pattern ''default Electron icon'' } | Select-Object Filename, LineNumber, Line")

Bash(powershell -Command "Get-ChildItem -Path ''E:\\JoyDesc\\Joydescription\\node_modules\\electron-builder\\'' -Filter ''*.js'' -Recurse | ForEach-Object { Select-String -Path $_.FullName -Pattern ''default Electron icon'' } | Select-Object Filename, LineNumber, Line")
